allow: Bash(.venv/Scripts/python.exe -c "from src.main import main; print\(''Import OK''\)")
Bash(python -c "from src.core.macros_utils import scale_macros, calculate_totals, build_db_items; from src.models.nutrition_models import *; print\('macros_utils OK'\)")
Bash(python -c "from src.core.macros_utils import scale_macros, calculate_totals, build_db_items; print\('macros_utils OK'\)")
Bash(python -c "from src.processors.base_ai_processor import BaseAIProcessor; print\('base_ai_processor OK'\)")
Bash(JWT_SECRET_KEY=test python -c "from src.api import auth; print\('auth OK'\)")
Bash(JWT_SECRET_KEY=test python -c "from src.api.main import app; print\('App OK'\); print\('Routes:', [r.path for r in app.routes]\)")
Bash(JWT_SECRET_KEY=test python -m pytest tests/test_config tests/test_core tests/test_processors -v)
Bash(JWT_SECRET_KEY=test python -m pytest tests/test_config tests/test_core tests/test_processors tests/test_services -v)
Bash(JWT_SECRET_KEY=test python -m pytest tests/test_config tests/test_core tests/test_processors tests/test_services -v --tb=short)
